verses.text: It is good to give thanks to the LORD, declaring His lovingkindness in the morning and His faithfulness at night, with music. Praise befits every hour. To begin and end the day with thanksgiving is the sweet duty of the godly.

It is good to give thanks to the LORD, declaring His lovingkindness in the morning and His faithfulness at night, with music. Praise befits every hour. To begin and end the day with thanksgiving is the sweet duty of the godly.

It is good to give thanks to the LORD, declaring His lovingkindness in the morning and His faithfulness at night, with music. Praise befits every hour. To begin and end the day with thanksgiving is the sweet duty of the godly.

God's works make the psalmist glad, though 'a brutish man knoweth not, neither doth a fool understand this.' Spiritual eyes are needed. The wonders that thrill the believer are lost on the heart that will not see God in them.

Though the wicked spring up like grass, it is only that they may be destroyed for ever, while God is on high evermore. Their flourishing is brief. The very prosperity of the ungodly ripens them for judgment.

Though the wicked spring up like grass, it is only that they may be destroyed for ever, while God is on high evermore. Their flourishing is brief. The very prosperity of the ungodly ripens them for judgment.

God exalts the psalmist's horn and anoints him with fresh oil, and he sees the downfall of his foes. Strength and gladness are renewed. God revives His servant and overthrows those who rise against him.

God exalts the psalmist's horn and anoints him with fresh oil, and he sees the downfall of his foes. Strength and gladness are renewed. God revives His servant and overthrows those who rise against him.

'The righteous shall flourish like the palm tree,' planted in God's house, still bearing fruit in old age, to show 'that the LORD is upright.' The godly are evergreen. Rooted near God, they grow fruitful even when their years are many.
